reviews.review_description: I love this game. A friend and I have been playing this for several years. We have played all the courts   Love the tires, and the platform as well as the normal court. My question is where is the pier I read about and see. That looks so fun but I don’t know how to access it. We would love to play a new court. Also I don’t see where you can pick easy or hard as it shows on description.

developer_response.body: Hello, Judy! I'm glad you're enjoying the game! The pier can be accessed on the court selection screen at the top when playing in single player, or by pressing the "change parks" button at the bottom in multiplayer. Difficulty settings only apply in single player and you can choose them by selecting a star (1-3) on one of the courts before pressing play. I hope that helps you continue to enjoy the game! Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. :)

reviews.review_description:
This game isn't bad. Cool and novel environments, the physics are decent (though sometimes I'll aim to the side where the little ball (I forget it's name) has landed, yet the game strangely realigns my shot to the centre. 

There also doesn't seem to be a tutorial and I had to figure things out the hard way. It is reasonably intuitive though.

But yeah, my main issue is that there is no pass and play mechanic to play on one headset. I don't have much interest to play anyone online, and not everyone in the world has a Quest. But this would be perfect to have pass and play where friends and family without VR can come round and play something. I see no reason why it doesn't have it, and if it did I would definitely buy this game rather than just sampling it on Horizon+
The game looks nice and there is not much of a tutorial, maybe I am missing something but just standing there throwing a ball is not really my idea of fun.

The game looks nice and the Single-player works fine on my Quest 3, but as soon as I try to join a room in Multiplayer, the game freezes. I’ve tried reinstalling the game, but that didn’t help. Edit: turned out to be a WiFi-issue. With my phone as a hotspot it all works!

reviews.review_title: Great game to play with friends
reviews.review_description: I feel with more support from the community this game could really shine. It has great bones and level design and is super fun. It feel reminiscent of Walkabout Mini Golf and that’s a really good thing.
Great physics, bots, multiplayer. Thanks for making music optional. Recommend.

I've had this for a while and already thought it was pretty great, but a friend of mine recently picked it up and we played together. We had so much fun I thought I'd share some details.
I originally thought the courts other than the 'standard' ones were gimmicky and not worth a more than a quick round each, never to be returned to. In fact, they all offer something a bit different and the discovery that you can move from court to court DURING A MATCH was quite a revelation!
Then we found and turned off the option that restricts you to just playing on the actual courts! We ended up playing for over an hour, picking bits of the environment to use in improvised games: throwing off the edge of the pier; onto buildings and up stairs!
Try changing the throw strength up to 250% for an interesting twist as well!
The courts that have different physical surfaces (sand, concrete) add a dynamic that other games like this lack and it works really well.
I'd love to see a new environment (along with some new courts) one day, but, as it is, this is definitely going to be a game we come back to a lot.
PS. I was able to play this with my girlfriend, both using my Meta account on two different headsets, so that's possible should anyone need it to!
Cheers dev! :)

Great game! Like another reviewer said, if you like Walkabout Mini Golf you’re going to really like this. Looking forward to future updates with possible add on courses to purchase.  Would be cool if you could overlook the entire park with a huge head like in Walkabout. Thanks for giving me yet another great game to completely annihilate my family members and friends! 5 stars goose :)
This game should be on main store.  It has ForeVR quality.  Only thing it needs is a media player like ForeVR has so you can listen to music or watch YouTube while you play.  4.7 out of 5

This looked like it could be a fun game but once I opened it and tried a game, I knew I'd be refunding it. Released in mid-2022 and no updates since is a sign of a game that's just been abandoned and left to languish in the store with no updates or improvements. Always look at the release date before buying a game and see how many Updates are mentioned on the store page. If none, the game was left to rot. 

I think developers don't realize the effect that good sounds can bring to a game. The sound when the ball hits the ground, another ball, or object seems carelessly implemented. Just some lightweight tick sound that kills the immersion for me. This app is very bare bones aesthetically and physics wise and carries a price in line with some very polished games in the real Meta shop. I'm all about supporting development, but only if the game has some kind of path forward. Not a basic version that's dumped in the store and never updated or refreshed. 

If you are a single player person, there are bots to play against that talk trash. I didn't see a way to shut that off so that was a dealbreaker. I'm a casual gamer and taunting whether from other players or bots is poor form. As an option? Fine. But having that forced on you? No thanks.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you didn't enjoy yourself. A couple of things that I'd like to note, however: The game has received multiple updates since release, including a second park, player avatars, expansion from 4-8 players and up to 4 teams, a UI overhaul and multiple physics improvements. There also is a way to mute/disable the AI's commentary in the audio settings. If you go to settings>audio you'll see an "AI voice" button at the bottom to disable it.

reviews.review_description: You were using your "Amateur Throw" than my Normal Throw for Easy Mode!🙎💢

developer_response.body: I'm not sure what you mean by this. Do you mean Botty was too good for the easy difficulty? Or do you mean the throwing felt off, or that you wanted spin enabled by default? Either way, I'm sorry you didn't seem to enjoy yourself. I hope you give the game another chance and have some fun!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game!  Everything from the game play to the surroundings are spot on.  Love Boty Mcbot face and his comments during the match. Can’t wait to see new areas that are being developed. Great price. Definitely worth it!

reviews.review_title: So much fun! Can’t believe its only $9!
reviews.review_description: This game will have you hooked immediately. The physics are great and its really competitive with friends. I’ve never even played Bocce Ball before and I cant stop playing. I think this one can reach the heights of something like Walkabout Mini Golf. Plus, the Dev seems like a really cool dude and is really responsive to feedback. Definitely recommend!!

reviews.review_title: Reminded me of Walkabout Mini Golf.
reviews.review_description:
Simple games are sometimes the best type of games to play on the Oculus and Bocce is no different.

A lot of fun to play in the single player. Haven't found an online multiplayer opponent yet, I guess due to the game being new, but hopefully that will change.

Very similar stylings to Walkabout Mini Golf and if you enjoy that game you will enjoy this.

So far the AI opponent is very good, but I find (on the first map) if you throw the jack in one of the top corners, it's easier to win against the AI opponent.

Also the ball physics aren't perfect. The ball stops rolling too soon for my liking and doesn't seem realistic enough. However that doesn't take away the enjoyment of the game.

This has huge potential, and hopefully the developers will add more crazy maps to make this game even better.

This game is a real gem. Much like Walkabout Mini Golf and Eleven Table Tennis, the physics here are spot on. Lots of different courts to play on, smooth multiplayer and unlockables. Give this game a go for sure. If you have a few friends, this is a must buy. Really looking forward to more courts, unlockables and seeing the community grow!

Realistic feel, interesting courts with more in the works, multiplayer works great with up to four players and weekend tournaments. Very new game so group of players is small but growing and is drawing a nicely competitive crowd. I own a bocce set IRL and this game does it real justice with a bit of a twist. I am pleased.

reviews.review_title: Fun app to lose yourself in with friends
reviews.review_description:
I was looking for something new to try and thought I'd give this a go. 
While the mechanics took a little trial and error at the start and I only had the most basic understanding of how to play Bocce, I now thoroughly enjoy playing this that I've recommend this app to my husband and we enjoy a competitive game to 11 on one of the pier courses after some WalkAbout. 

I found the trash talking NPC when I first started playing the app by myself highly amusing and this encouraged me to do better.

I highly suggest this to anyone who likes WalkAbout or Arcade Legend! 

Keep it up dev team!
Great game to play with friends and family. I would recommend this game for all age groups.

At the time of this review there are currently 12 different courses, with 6 courses being in each of the 2 parks. Different surfaces, angles, and obstacles make each one a unique challenge. Super easy to play, but difficult to master. The game is at it's best when played with others! Grab a friend or 3 and hop in for an absolute blast!

If you don't have someone to join you, the Bocce Time! discord is one of the most welcoming I've been in. People are always around for games and hanging out. Very wholesome and welcoming. https://discord.gg/kUmaZZD7HD Get in here!

must say what a game you can spend hours on this game very well done.. be great when they sought avatars out instead of looking like a tic tac lol. this is a must buy you will not be disappointed . 5 stars from me
